resources.string:
Last Updated: 2026-04-02

 PocketBudget is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we handle your data.

 1. Information Collection
 We only collect information that you explicitly provide and that is necessary for the app to function. This includes:
 • SMS Access: We use the SMS permission solely to automatically read and categorize your M-Pesa transactions. This helps you track your expenses without any manual entry.
 • Device Information: We do not collect or upload any device information or personal identification.

 2. Local Storage & Security
 • All financial data stays locally on your device. We do not have any servers, and we do not upload your data to any cloud service.
 • Database Encryption: Your local database is encrypted using SQLCipher to ensure that your financial data is secure even if your device is compromised.

 3. Third-Party Services
 We do not share any data with third-party services. The app is completely offline-first.

 4. Your Control
 You have full control over your data. You can delete all your data at any time through the settings menu.

 5. Contact Us
 If you have any questions or concerns about this policy, please contact us at support@ics2300.pocketbudget.
